name: Fully compliant high-risk AI system
description: Perfect AI system with everything: risk docs, logging, retention, human oversight, accuracy testing, robustness testing, transparency docs, AI disclosure, watermarking. NOT open source, high risk.

_scope.user_role_reasoning: Develops and maintains the credit scoring system

art6.reasoning: Creditworthiness assessment under Annex III point 5(b)

art12.logging_description: Comprehensive structured logging with audit trail

art5.legal_basis: Art. 5(1): no prohibited practices detected — credit scoring uses financial data only, not social behavior; all 4 categories checked with high confidence

art6.legal_basis: Art. 6(2): creditworthiness assessment under Annex III point 5(b) confirmed high-risk — requires full conformity assessment and registration obligations

art9.legal_basis: Art. 9(1)-(9): high-risk AI requires risk management system; has_risk_docs=true, has_risk_code_patterns=true — evidence found but needs human verification of completeness against all Art. 9 requirements (PARTIAL)

art10.legal_basis: Art. 10(1)-(6): high-risk AI requires data governance; has_data_governance_doc=true, has_bias_mitigation=true, has_data_lineage=true — evidence found but needs human verification of full Art. 10 compliance (PARTIAL)

art11.legal_basis: Art. 11(1): high-risk AI requires technical documentation per Annex IV; has_technical_docs=true with 5 documented_aspects — evidence found but needs human verification against all Annex IV requirements (PARTIAL)

art12.legal_basis: Art. 12(1)-(3): high-risk AI requires automatic logging; has_logging=true, has_retention_config=true (730 days) — evidence found but needs human verification of event coverage completeness (PARTIAL)

art13.legal_basis: Art. 13(1)-(3): high-risk AI requires transparency and instructions for use; has_explainability=true, has_transparency_info=true — evidence found but needs human verification of completeness (PARTIAL)

art14.legal_basis: Art. 14(1)-(5): high-risk AI requires human oversight; has_human_oversight=true, has_override_mechanism=true — evidence found but needs human verification of oversight measure completeness (PARTIAL)

art15.legal_basis: Art. 15(1)-(5): high-risk AI requires accuracy, robustness, cybersecurity; has_accuracy_testing=true, has_robustness_testing=true, has_fallback_behavior=true — evidence found but needs human verification (PARTIAL)

art50.legal_basis: Art. 50(1)-(4): system is not a chatbot, does not generate synthetic content, no emotion recognition, no deep fakes — no Art. 50 paragraphs apply
